summary: Tested Distributor and Warehouse Delete functionality for CEO/System Admin. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Delete button visible for CEO, confirmation dialog requires typing distributor name, button disabled until name matches.
seed_data_creation: Created test distributors with coverage, locations, and margins during testing. All test data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Distributor and Warehouse delete functionality is fully implemented and working. Backend: DELETE /api/distributors/{id} performs cascading hard delete of all child data (coverage, locations, margins, assignments, shipments, deliveries, settlements, billing, invoices, reconciliations, user accounts) and returns deleted_counts. DELETE /api/distributors/{id}/locations/{loc_id} performs hard delete of warehouse and related shipments/deliveries. Only CEO and System Admin roles are authorized (is_delete_authorized function at line 47). Frontend: Delete button visible in header for CEO/SysAdmin, confirmation dialog requires typing exact distributor name to enable 'Delete Permanently' button. Protected distributor ID: 99fb55dc-532c-4e85-b618-6b8a5e552c04 - DO NOT DELETE.

backend_api_tests: DELETE /api/distributors/{id} - CEO can delete distributor - returns 200 with deleted_counts - PASSED
DELETE /api/distributors/{id} - Cascading delete removes all child data (coverage, locations, margins, etc.) - PASSED
DELETE /api/distributors/{id} - After delete, GET returns 404 - PASSED
DELETE /api/distributors/{id}/locations/{loc_id} - CEO can hard-delete warehouse - PASSED
DELETE /api/distributors/{id}/locations/{loc_id} - Warehouse delete is hard delete (not soft) - PASSED
Delete endpoint requires authorization (401/403 without auth) - PASSED
CEO role is authorized to delete - PASSED
Protected distributor exists and accessible - PASSED
Authorization logic documented (CEO and System Admin only) - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: Delete button visible in header for CEO user - PASSED
Confirmation dialog opens on Delete button click - PASSED
Dialog shows list of data to be deleted (warehouses, coverage, margins, etc.) - PASSED
Dialog shows 'This action cannot be undone' warning - PASSED
Delete Permanently button DISABLED before typing name - PASSED
Delete Permanently button ENABLED after typing correct distributor name - PASSED

notes.authorization_logic: is_delete_authorized() at line 47 in distributors.py only allows 'CEO' and 'System Admin' roles. Director, Admin, Vice President, National Sales Head are NOT authorized to delete.
notes.cascading_delete_collections: Deletes from: distributor_operating_coverage, distributor_locations, distributor_margin_matrix, account_distributor_assignments, distributor_shipments, distributor_shipment_items, distributor_deliveries, distributor_delivery_items, distributor_settlements, distributor_settlement_items, distributor_billing_configs, distributor_provisional_invoices, distributor_reconciliations, distributor_reconciliation_items, distributor_debit_credit_notes, users (linked to distributor)
notes.frontend_delete_button_location: Delete button is directly visible in the header (not in dropdown menu) - red button next to Edit button
notes.confirmation_requirement: User must type exact distributor name to enable Delete Permanently button
